DETR 全仿真运行展示

基于已落盘的 gated playbook artifact 自动生成。页面不重跑流程，只展示当时真实 transcript、payload 和 runtime 产物。

概览 Bridge 预检与解析 Gate 时间线 Payload 展示 Runtime Views Handoff Final Result Receipts 与 Registry

从 topicSeed=DETR 到 final candidate 的逐步执行记录

这份展示页把一次 create topic synthesis gated run 拆成可审计步骤：每步先看到实际命令，再看 gate/action 返回，再看 agent 写入的 payload 或 runtime 生成的文件。所有路径均来自 artifact mirror，敏感本机路径沿用 playbook 的脱敏结果。

Topic SeedDETR
Operationcreate
Final Kindtopic_synthesis
Gate Commands24
Action Receipts10
Payload Files14
Views7
Sections2
Sidecars3
输入：runtime/input.json Prepare：Stage 00/10/20/30 Core：Stage 00/40/50 Finalize：Stage 00/60/70 输出：result/final-output.candidate.json
运行根目录：workspace/runtime/acp/skill-runs/acp-skill-detr-create-topic-synthesis

5 篇样例论文选择

正式 gated run 的 Stage 20 使用 explicit resolver，仅纳入这里的 5 篇代表论文。下面内容来自 selected paper set artifact。

#标题年份Key选择理由
selected-paper-set 未提供可展开条目。

Bridge 预检与 resolver 预选

这些是正式 skill gate 前的真实只读 Bridge 调用，用于确认 Zotero Bridge 可用、读取 manifest/topic/library index，并用真实 resolver 结果确定 5 篇样例论文。

01. debug-status

okTrue

命令

zotero-bridge debug status
Bridge 返回 JSON
{
  "data": {
    "approval": "none",
    "capability": "debug.status",
    "data": {
      "debugMode": true,
      "generatedAt": "2026-06-06T08:11:49.274Z",
      "hostBridge": {
        "authRequired": true,
        "bindMode": "lan",
        "lanEnabled": true,
        "status": "running"
      },
      "limits": {
        "includeLocalPaths": false,
        "includeRawRows": false,
        "limit": 100
      },
      "runtimePersistence": {
        "acpSkillRunsDir": "<redacted-local-path>",
        "runtimeRoot": "<redacted-local-path>"
      },
      "schema": "host_bridge.debug.status.v1"
    }
  },
  "meta": {
    "cli": "zotero-bridge",
    "schema": "zotero-bridge.cli.v1"
  },
  "ok": true
}

02. library-index-page-0

okTrue

命令

zotero-bridge synthesis get-library-index --input {"cursor": 0, "limit": 200}

03. list-topics

okTrue

命令

zotero-bridge synthesis list-topics --input {}
Bridge 返回 JSON
{
  "data": {
    "approval": "none",
    "capability": "synthesis.list_topics",
    "data": {
      "diagnostics": {
        "count": 0,
        "source": "sqlite-topic-graph"
      },
      "topics": []
    }
  },
  "meta": {
    "cli": "zotero-bridge",
    "schema": "zotero-bridge.cli.v1"
  },
  "ok": true
}

05. resolver-discovery

okTrue

命令

zotero-bridge synthesis resolve-resolver --input {"resolver": {"mode": "tag_query", "query": {"and": ["model:DL/DETR"]}}}
Bridge 返回 JSON
{
  "data": {
    "approval": "none",
    "capability": "synthesis.resolve_resolver",
    "data": {
      "cursor": "0",
      "diagnostics": {
        "final_count": 22,
        "rejected": false,
        "total_candidates": 65
      },
      "errors": [],
      "has_more": false,
      "limit": 100,
      "next_cursor": "",
      "normalized_resolver": {
        "mode": "tag_query",
        "query": {
          "and": [
            "model:DL/DETR"
          ]
        }
      },
      "ok": true,
      "papers": [
        {
          "item_key": "29IBKEUR",
          "match_reasons": [
            "tag_query"
          ],
          "paper_ref": "1:29IBKEUR",
          "title": "Sparse DETR: efficient end-to-end object detection with learnable sparsity"
        },
        {
          "item_key": "3JUY9GBQ",
          "match_reasons": [
            "tag_query"
          ],
          "paper_ref": "1:3JUY9GBQ",
          "title": "DETR3D: 3D object detection from multi-view images via 3D-to-2D queries"
        },
        {
          "item_key": "3YG8UNCI",
          "match_reasons": [
            "tag_query"
          ],
          "paper_ref": "1:3YG8UNCI",
          "title": "Rank-DETR for high quality object detection"
        },
        {
          "item_key": "5HBHAWIV",
          "match_reasons": [
            "tag_query"
          ],
          "paper_ref": "1:5HBHAWIV",
          "title": "Deformable DETR: deformable transformers for end-to-end object detection"
        },
        {
          "item_key": "7AERRYC7",
          "match_reasons": [
            "tag_query"
          ],
          "paper_ref": "1:7AERRYC7",

        {
          "item_key": "8838AH6P",
          "match_reasons": [
            "tag_query"
          ],

          "match_reasons": [
            "tag_query"
          ],

        },
        {
          "item_key": "CGJBFE6C",
          "match_reasons": [
            "tag_query"
          ],
          "paper_ref": "1:CGJBFE6C",
          "title": "Enhancing DETRs variants through improved content query and similar query aggregation"
        },
        {
          "item_key": "D6BUKS9Q",
          "match_reasons": [
            "tag_query"
          ],
          "paper_ref": "1:D6BUKS9Q",
          "title": "DETRs with Hybrid Matching"
        },
        {
          "item_key": "DBYQ4LWE",
          "match_reasons": [
            "tag_query"
          ],
          "paper_ref": "1:DBYQ4LWE",
          "title": "Group DETR: Fast DETR Training with Group-Wise One-to-Many Assignment"
        },
        {
          "item_key": "EIMSDEU3",
          "match_reasons": [
            "tag_query"
          ],

        },
        {

          "match_reasons": [
            "tag_query"
          ],
          "paper_ref": "1:GHWYS7AF",
          "title": "RT-DETRv3: real-time end-to-end object detection with hierarchical dense positive supervision"
        },
        {
          "item_key": "HPLZ65Z2",
          "match_reasons": [
            "tag_query"
          ],
          "paper_ref": "1:HPLZ65Z2",
          "title": "DINO: DETR with improved DeNoising anchor boxes for end-to-end object detection"

            "tag_query"
          ],
          "paper_ref": "1:P5NLH47E",

            "tag_query"

07. status

okTrue

命令

zotero-bridge status
Bridge 返回 JSON
{
  "data": {
    "authRequired": true,
    "bindMode": "lan",
    "lanEnabled": true,
    "protocol": "host-bridge.v1",
    "status": "running"
  },
  "meta": {
    "cli": "zotero-bridge",
    "schema": "zotero-bridge.cli.v1"
  },
  "ok": true
}

Gate / Run / Submit 时间线

每张卡片对应一次实际命令。Payload stage 展示当步写入的 payload；run/submit stage 展示 runtime 在该步生成的主要文件。

01Prepare · gate

01-prepare-gate-stage_00

stage_00_runtime_setup · needs_payload=False

schema_idsynthesis.topic_synthesis_gate_instruction
skill_idcreate-topic-synthesis-prepare
stagestage_00_runtime_setup
stage_kindcommand
needs_payloadFalse
operationcreate
task初始化或校验新建运行的本地 SQLite 状态。
commandpython "D:\Workspace\Code\JavaScript\Zotero-Skills\skills_builtin\create-topic-synthesis-prepare\scripts\gate.py" --db "runtime/topic-synthesis.sqlite" --action run

实际执行命令

<redacted-local-path> <redacted-local-path> --db runtime/topic-synthesis.sqlite --input runtime/input.json
Gate/Action 返回 JSON
{
  "command": "python \"D:\\Workspace\\Code\\JavaScript\\Zotero-Skills\\skills_builtin\\create-topic-synthesis-prepare\\scripts\\gate.py\" --db \"runtime/topic-synthesis.sqlite\" --action run",
  "db_path": "runtime/topic-synthesis.sqlite",
  "needs_payload": false,
  "operation": "create",
  "schema_id": "synthesis.topic_synthesis_gate_instruction",
  "schema_version": "1.0.0",
  "skill_id": "create-topic-synthesis-prepare",
  "stage": "stage_00_runtime_setup",
  "stage_kind": "command",
  "task": "初始化或校验新建运行的本地 SQLite 状态。"
}

skill_idcreate-topic-synthesis-prepare

okTrue

schema_idsynthesis.topic_synthesis_gate_instruction

stagestage_10_create_topic_context
stage_kindpayload
needs_payloadTrue
operationcreate
payload_pathruntime/payloads/create-topic-context.json

task编写新建主题意图和重复检查判断。

submit_commandpython "D:\Workspace\Code\JavaScript\Zotero-Skills\skills_builtin\create-topic-synthesis-prepare\scripts\gate.py" --db "runtime/topic-synthesis.sqlite" --action submit --payload "runtime/payloads/create-topic-context.json"

stage_10_create_topic_context

skill_idcreate-topic-synthesis-prepare
stagestage_10_create_topic_context
okTrue

<redacted-local-path> <redacted-local-path> --db runtime/topic-synthesis.sqlite --action submit --payload runtime/payloads/create-topic-context.json
Gate/Action 返回 JSON
{
  "ok": true,
  "result": {
    "duplicate_status": "none",
    "topic_definition": {
      "id": "detr-style-object-detection",
      "title": "DETR-style Object Detection"
    }
  },
  "skill_id": "create-topic-synthesis-prepare",
  "stage": "stage_10_create_topic_context"
}

本步手写 Payload

workspace/runtime/acp/skill-runs/acp-skill-detr-create-topic-synthesis/runtime/payloads/create-topic-context.json
{
  "aliases": [
    "DETR",
    "Detection Transformer",
    "DETR-family detectors"
  ],
  "definition": "以 DETR 为起点的 query-based、set-prediction 目标检测方法族，重点关注端到端检测、训练收敛、query/anchor 设计、多尺度特征和实时化变体。",
  "diagnostics": [],
  "duplicate_candidate_ids": [],
  "duplicate_reason": "Host Bridge list-topics 返回空 topic 列表；本次 create run 未发现已有 DETR topic。",
  "duplicate_status": "none",
  "scope_exclude": [
    "仅使用 DINOv2/DINOv3 表征但不讨论 DETR 检测框架的论文",
    "泛 Transformer 或 ViT 分类论文",
    "传统 CNN/YOLO/Faster R-CNN 背景论文，除非作为对照"
  ],
  "scope_include": [
    "DETR 原始方法",
    "DETR-family 目标检测变体",
    "收敛加速与 query/anchor 设计",
    "2D/3D/real-time detection transformer 扩展"
  ],
  "topic_title": "DETR-style Object Detection"
}

本步 runtime 生成文件

  • workspace/runtime/acp/skill-runs/acp-skill-detr-create-topic-synthesis/runtime/stage-receipts/stage_10_create_topic_context.json
缺失：workspace/runtime/acp/skill-runs/acp-skill-detr-create-topic-synthesis/runtime/stage-receipts/stage_10_create_topic_context.json

schema_idsynthesis.topic_synthesis_gate_instruction

needs_payloadTrue
operationcreate

本步手写 Payload

workspace/runtime/acp/skill-runs/acp-skill-detr-create-topic-synthesis/runtime/payloads/resolver-and-workset.json
{
  "diagnostics": [
    {
      "code": "bounded_playbook_workset",
      "message": "为构建可维护的全仿真 playbook，paper triage 与 cross-paper context 限定为 5 篇代表论文。",
      "resolver_total": 22,
      "selected_count": 5
    }
  ],
  "operation_intent": "create",
  "resolver": {
    "mode": "explicit",
    "paper_refs": [
      "1:EIMSDEU3",
      "1:5HBHAWIV",
      "1:HPLZ65Z2",
      "1:3JUY9GBQ",
      "1:SZ3GNWT9"
    ]
  },
  "resolver_reasoning": "先用真实 `model:DL/DETR` tag_query resolver 获得 22 篇候选；正式 gated run 只纳入 5 篇代表论文，覆盖原始 DETR、Deformable/DINO 收敛改进、DETR3D 范式扩展和 RF-DETR 近期实时变体。"
}

07-prepare-gate-stage_30

stage_30_prepare_analysis_context · needs_payload=True

schema_idsynthesis.topic_synthesis_gate_instruction
skill_idcreate-topic-synthesis-prepare
stagestage_30_prepare_analysis_context
stage_kindpayload
needs_payloadTrue
operationcreate
payload_pathruntime/payloads/prepare-analysis-context.json
payload_schemaassets/schemas/stage-30-prepare-analysis-context.schema.json
task为已解析的文献工作集编写轻量 paper triage 判断。
commandpython "D:\Workspace\Code\JavaScript\Zotero-Skills\skills_builtin\create-topic-synthesis-prepare\scripts\gate.py" --db "runtime/topic-synthesis.sqlite" --action run
submit_commandpython "D:\Workspace\Code\JavaScript\Zotero-Skills\skills_builtin\create-topic-synthesis-prepare\scripts\gate.py" --db "runtime/topic-synthesis.sqlite" --action submit --payload "runtime/payloads/prepare-analysis-context.json"

    "runtime/views/filtered-paper-artifacts/"
  ],

本步手写 Payload

workspace/runtime/acp/skill-runs/acp-skill-detr-create-topic-synthesis/runtime/payloads/prepare-analysis-context.json
{
  "assessments": [
    {
      "caveats": [
        "原始训练收敛慢，对小目标和多尺度细节不够友好。"
      ],
      "core_digest": "DETR 把目标检测重构为集合预测问题，用 Transformer decoder object queries 和 Hungarian matching 避免手工 NMS/anchor 后处理，是本 topic 的方法原点。",
      "diagnostics": [],
      "paper_quality_level": "high",
      "paper_quality_reason": "作为 baseline 和概念源头质量高；后续变体几乎都以其训练速度和小目标表现为问题起点。",
      "paper_ref": "1:EIMSDEU3",
      "relevance_level": "core",
      "relevance_reason": "DETR 原始论文，直接定义了 set prediction、object queries 和 bipartite matching 的端到端检测范式。"
    },
    {
      "caveats": [
        "主要回答效率和多尺度问题，不直接覆盖 denoising 或实时部署路线。"
      ],
      "core_digest": "Deformable DETR 用稀疏 deformable attention 让 query 只关注少量关键采样点，显著改善训练效率和小目标检测。",
      "diagnostics": [],
      "paper_quality_level": "high",
      "paper_quality_reason": "围绕 attention sparsity 和 multi-scale feature sampling 给出明确机制，是理解 DETR-family 工程化改进的核心文献。",
      "paper_ref": "1:5HBHAWIV",
      "relevance_level": "core",
      "relevance_reason": "Deformable DETR 是解决 DETR 收敛慢和多尺度特征利用不足的代表性改进。"
    },
    {
      "caveats": [
        "标题中的 DINO 易与自监督视觉表征 DINOv2/DINOv3 混淆，topic 边界需明确限定为 DETR 检测。"
      ],
      "core_digest": "DINO 通过 denoising anchor boxes 改善 query 学习和 matching 稳定性，展示 DETR-family 从概念验证走向强检测器的训练技术路线。",
      "diagnostics": [],
      "paper_quality_level": "high",
      "paper_quality_reason": "将 query denoising、anchor 设计和端到端检测性能结合，适合支撑训练稳定性和 high-performing variants 的分析。",
      "paper_ref": "1:HPLZ65Z2",
      "relevance_level": "core",
      "relevance_reason": "DINO 代表 denoising training 与 improved anchor boxes 路线，是 DETR 收敛和性能提升的重要节点。"
    },
    {
      "caveats": [
        "它属于 3D/自动驾驶扩展，不能替代 2D DETR-family 主线。"
      ],
      "core_digest": "DETR3D 使用 3D-to-2D queries 把多视角图像信息组织到 3D 检测中，说明 DETR 的 query/set prediction 思路可跨越 2D COCO 场景。",
      "diagnostics": [],
      "paper_quality_level": "medium",
      "paper_quality_reason": "论文展示 query-based detection transformer 在自动驾驶 3D 场景中的迁移价值，是 topic 外延的重要证据。",
      "paper_ref": "1:3JUY9GBQ",
      "relevance_level": "core",
      "relevance_reason": "DETR3D 将 DETR 查询范式扩展到多视角 3D object detection，代表 detection paradigm extension。"
    },
    {
      "caveats": [
        "作为 2025 近期文献，需在后续人工综述中继续核实其影响力和独立复现情况。"
      ],
      "core_digest": "RF-DETR 把 DETR-family 推向实时检测和架构搜索/部署约束，显示该主题从收敛改进继续演化到效率、迁移和工程约束。",
      "diagnostics": [],
      "paper_quality_level": "medium",
      "paper_quality_reason": "其标签覆盖 real-time、pretraining、fine-tuning、edge-deployment，适合暴露当前 collection 的近期发展面向。",
      "paper_ref": "1:SZ3GNWT9",
      "relevance_level": "core",
      "relevance_reason": "RF-DETR 是近期 real-time detection transformers 方向的高相关变体，反映 DETR-family 与实时部署需求的结合。"
    }
  ]
}

workspace/runtime/acp/skill-runs/acp-skill-detr-create-topic-synthesis/runtime/views/cross-paper-context.md
# Cross-paper Context

- `1:3JUY9GBQ` DETR3D: 3D object detection from multi-view images via 3D-to-2D queries: DETR3D 使用 3D-to-2D queries 把多视角图像信息组织到 3D 检测中，说明 DETR 的 query/set prediction 思路可跨越 2D COCO 场景。
- `1:5HBHAWIV` Deformable DETR: deformable transformers for end-to-end object detection: Deformable DETR 用稀疏 deformable attention 让 query 只关注少量关键采样点，显著改善训练效率和小目标检测。
- `1:EIMSDEU3` End-to-end object detection with transformers: DETR 把目标检测重构为集合预测问题，用 Transformer decoder object queries 和 Hungarian matching 避免手工 NMS/anchor 后处理，是本 topic 的方法原点。
- `1:HPLZ65Z2` DINO: DETR with improved DeNoising anchor boxes for end-to-end object detection: DINO 通过 denoising anchor boxes 改善 query 学习和 matching 稳定性，展示 DETR-family 从概念验证走向强检测器的训练技术路线。
- `1:SZ3GNWT9` RF-DETR: neural architecture search for real-time detection transformers: RF-DETR 把 DETR-family 推向实时检测和架构搜索/部署约束，显示该主题从收敛改进继续演化到效率、迁移和工程约束。

{
  "claims": [
    {
      "claim": "DETR 的核心贡献是把 detection 建模为集合预测，减少 anchor/NMS 等手工组件。",
      "evidence": [
        "1:EIMSDEU3"
      ]
    },
    {
      "claim": "后续代表性工作主要围绕收敛速度、多尺度特征和 query/anchor 训练稳定性展开。",

        "1:HPLZ65Z2"

        "1:SZ3GNWT9"

  "concept_candidate_labels": [
    "DETR",
    "object queries",
    "Hungarian matching",
    "deformable attention",
    "denoising training",
    "real-time detection transformer"
  ],
  "debates": [

      "question": "端到端 set prediction 是否能在效率上持续接近或替代 YOLO-style detector？",

        "1:SZ3GNWT9"
      ]
    }

workspace/runtime/acp/skill-runs/acp-skill-detr-create-topic-synthesis/runtime/payloads/kg-enrichment.json
{
  "concept_details": [
    {
      "description": "End-to-end object detection with transformers.",
      "kind": "topic_root",
      "label": "DETR"
    },
    {
      "description": "Decoder queries representing predicted objects.",
      "kind": "method_concept",
      "label": "object queries"
    },
    {
      "description": "Sparse multi-scale attention used by Deformable DETR.",
      "kind": "method_concept",
      "label": "deformable attention"
    },
    {
      "description": "DINO-style auxiliary denoising to stabilize DETR training.",
      "kind": "training_strategy",
      "label": "denoising training"
    }
  ],
  "diagnostics": [],
  "topic_matching_terms": {
    "diagnostics": [],
    "exclude_terms": [
      "DINOv3 feature encoder",
      "generic ViT classification"
    ],
    "include_terms": [
      "DETR",
      "Detection Transformer",
      "DETR-family",
      "end-to-end object detection"
    ],
    "methods": [
      "set prediction",
      "object queries",
      "Hungarian matching",
      "deformable attention",
      "denoising training"
    ],
    "must_have_terms": [
      "DETR"
    ]
  },
  "topic_relation_candidates": [
    {
      "evidence": [
        "1:5HBHAWIV"
      ],
      "relation": "has_variant",
      "source": "DETR",
      "target": "Deformable DETR"
    },
    {
      "evidence": [
        "1:HPLZ65Z2"
      ],
      "relation": "has_variant",
      "source": "DETR",
      "target": "DINO"
    },
    {
      "evidence": [
        "1:3JUY9GBQ"
      ],
      "relation": "extends_to",
      "source": "DETR",
      "target": "3D object detection"
    }
  ]
}

workspace/runtime/acp/skill-runs/acp-skill-detr-create-topic-synthesis/runtime/payloads/coverage-and-collection-suggestions.json
{
  "coverage_caveats": [
    {
      "message": "未纳入全部 22 篇 resolver 候选。",
      "type": "bounded_sample"
    },
    {
      "message": "未覆盖 Conditional DETR、DN-DETR、RT-DETRv2/v3、Group DETR 等候选。",
      "type": "missing_variants"
    }
  ],
  "coverage_reason": "全仿真样例只选择 5 篇代表论文，足以覆盖 DETR 原点、收敛改进、训练策略、3D 扩展和近期实时化，但不能代表完整 DETR-family 文献图谱。",
  "coverage_verdict": "partial",
  "diagnostics": [],
  "external_context_summary": "split runtime 未抓取外部网络文献；external-literature-context.md 仅记录本 run 没有 external fetch。",
  "reliability_summary": "所有 5 篇均来自真实 Host Bridge resolver 返回集合，并通过 runtime resolver cascade、citation metrics 和 filtered artifact export 进入同一 SQLite workset；结论可靠性适合作为 schema/playbook 基准，不适合作为最终学术综述。",
  "suggested_collection_directions": [
    {
      "direction": "补齐训练/收敛变体",
      "example_titles_or_terms": [
        "DN-DETR",
        "Conditional DETR",
        "Group DETR"
      ],
      "priority": "high",
      "reason": "当前样例只有 DINO 和 Deformable DETR，未纳入 DN-DETR、Conditional DETR、Group DETR。"
    },
    {
      "direction": "补齐实时 DETR 路线",
      "example_titles_or_terms": [
        "RT-DETR",
        "LW-DETR",
        "DETRs beat YOLOs"
      ],
      "priority": "medium",
      "reason": "RF-DETR 之外还需要 RT-DETR、LW-DETR、DETRs beat YOLOs 等文献支撑部署效率分析。"
    },
    {
      "direction": "加入综述与 benchmark",
      "example_titles_or_terms": [
        "Object Detection with Transformers: A Review"
      ],
      "priority": "medium",
      "reason": "后续正式 topic synthesis 需要 review paper 与 benchmark 论文校准术语和覆盖度。"
    }
  ]
}

全仿真样例只选择 5 篇代表论文，足以覆盖 DETR 原点、收敛改进、训练策略、3D 扩展和近期实时化，但不能代表完整 DETR-family 文献图谱。

      ],
      "priority": "medium",
      "reason": "后续正式 topic synthesis 需要 review paper 与 benchmark 论文校准术语和覆盖度。"
    }
  ]
}
缺失：workspace/runtime/acp/skill-runs/acp-skill-detr-create-topic-synthesis/runtime/stage-receipts/stage_60_coverage_and_collection_suggestions.json

本步手写 Payload

workspace/runtime/acp/skill-runs/acp-skill-detr-create-topic-synthesis/runtime/payloads/summary.json
{
  "diagnostics": [],
  "key_takeaways": [
    "DETR 的主题边界应限定为 query-based end-to-end object detection，避免混入泛 Transformer 或 DINOv3 表征文献。",
    "收敛效率和 query/anchor 设计是 DETR-family 最核心的改进轴。",
    "3D 与 real-time 方向说明 DETR 已从原始 2D 检测扩展到更复杂的应用约束。",
    "正式综述需要补充未入选的 17 篇 resolver 候选，尤其是 Conditional/DN/RT/LW/Group DETR。"
  ],
  "summary_brief": "DETR-style Object Detection 的样例 synthesis 显示：DETR 以 set prediction 和 object queries 开启端到端检测范式，后续代表性工作围绕收敛、多尺度、query/anchor 训练稳定性、3D 扩展和实时部署继续演化。",
  "summary_overview": "本次全仿真 playbook 使用真实 Zotero Bridge resolver 从 DETR 候选集中选择 5 篇代表论文，并通过 split runtime 生成 SQLite receipts、handoff、context views、sidecars、sections 和 final candidate。样例结论强调方法演进链：原始 DETR 定义问题，Deformable DETR 和 DINO 修复训练与多尺度瓶颈，DETR3D 展示范式迁移，RF-DETR 暴露实时化与部署方向。由于样例只使用 5 篇，最终结果应作为 schema 与 gate 基准，而不是完整主题综述。"
}

本步 runtime 生成文件

  • workspace/runtime/acp/skill-runs/acp-skill-detr-create-topic-synthesis/result/sections/summary.json · 1,315 bytes
  • workspace/runtime/acp/skill-runs/acp-skill-detr-create-topic-synthesis/result/topic-analysis.json · 1,170 bytes
  • workspace/runtime/acp/skill-runs/acp-skill-detr-create-topic-synthesis/result/final-output.candidate.json · 579 bytes
  • workspace/runtime/acp/skill-runs/acp-skill-detr-create-topic-synthesis/runtime/stage-receipts/stage_70_summary.json
workspace/runtime/acp/skill-runs/acp-skill-detr-create-topic-synthesis/result/sections/summary.json
{
  "diagnostics": [],
  "key_takeaways": [
    "DETR 的主题边界应限定为 query-based end-to-end object detection，避免混入泛 Transformer 或 DINOv3 表征文献。",
    "收敛效率和 query/anchor 设计是 DETR-family 最核心的改进轴。",
    "3D 与 real-time 方向说明 DETR 已从原始 2D 检测扩展到更复杂的应用约束。",
    "正式综述需要补充未入选的 17 篇 resolver 候选，尤其是 Conditional/DN/RT/LW/Group DETR。"
  ],
  "summary_brief": "DETR-style Object Detection 的样例 synthesis 显示：DETR 以 set prediction 和 object queries 开启端到端检测范式，后续代表性工作围绕收敛、多尺度、query/anchor 训练稳定性、3D 扩展和实时部署继续演化。",
  "summary_overview": "本次全仿真 playbook 使用真实 Zotero Bridge resolver 从 DETR 候选集中选择 5 篇代表论文，并通过 split runtime 生成 SQLite receipts、handoff、context views、sidecars、sections 和 final candidate。样例结论强调方法演进链：原始 DETR 定义问题，Deformable DETR 和 DINO 修复训练与多尺度瓶颈，DETR3D 展示范式迁移，RF-DETR 暴露实时化与部署方向。由于样例只使用 5 篇，最终结果应作为 schema 与 gate 基准，而不是完整主题综述。"
}

Payload 与 Runtime 输入

除 resolver/citation/artifact manifest 等 runtime-owned payload 外，业务语义 payload 均是 agent 按 gate 返回的 schema 写入后 submit。

runtime/input.json

workspace/runtime/acp/skill-runs/acp-skill-detr-create-topic-synthesis/runtime/input.json
{
  "language": "zh-CN",
  "operation": "create",
  "topicSeed": "DETR"
}

core-synthesis.json

agent 手写后 submit · 4,145 bytes

workspace/runtime/acp/skill-runs/acp-skill-detr-create-topic-synthesis/runtime/payloads/core-synthesis.json
{
  "claims": [
    {
      "claim": "DETR 的核心贡献是把 detection 建模为集合预测，减少 anchor/NMS 等手工组件。",
      "evidence": [
        "1:EIMSDEU3"
      ]
    },
    {
      "claim": "后续代表性工作主要围绕收敛速度、多尺度特征和 query/anchor 训练稳定性展开。",
      "evidence": [
        "1:5HBHAWIV",
        "1:HPLZ65Z2"
      ]
    },
    {
      "claim": "DETR-family 已从 2D COCO 检测扩展到 3D 与实时部署场景。",
      "evidence": [
        "1:3JUY9GBQ",
        "1:SZ3GNWT9"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "concept_candidate_labels": [
    "DETR",
    "object queries",
    "Hungarian matching",
    "deformable attention",
    "denoising training",
    "real-time detection transformer"
  ],
  "debates": [
    {
      "question": "端到端 set prediction 是否能在效率上持续接近或替代 YOLO-style detector？",
      "related_papers": [
        "1:SZ3GNWT9"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "gaps": [
    {
      "gap": "样例 workset 未覆盖完整 RT-DETR、DN-DETR、Conditional DETR 和综述论文。",
      "impact": "最终综述只能作为基准样例，不代表完整 DETR 主题分析。"
    }
  ],
  "improvement_dimension_summary": {
    "dimensions": [
      "convergence",
      "multi_scale",
      "query_anchor_design",
      "paradigm_extension",
      "real_time"
    ]
  },
  "improvement_dimensions": [
    {
      "dimension": "convergence",
      "papers": [
        "1:5HBHAWIV",
        "1:HPLZ65Z2"
      ],
      "summary": "减少原始 DETR 长训练和 matching 不稳定。"
    },
    {
      "dimension": "paradigm_extension",
      "papers": [
        "1:3JUY9GBQ"
      ],
      "summary": "把 query/set prediction 思路迁移到 3D 检测。"
    },
    {
      "dimension": "real_time",
      "papers": [
        "1:SZ3GNWT9"
      ],
      "summary": "面向实时检测和部署约束。"
    }
  ],
  "positioning": {
    "review_angle": "以 query-based detection 的问题-改进链组织综述：原始范式、收敛瓶颈、训练策略、外延扩展和部署效率。",
    "topic_boundary": "关注 DETR-family object detection，而不是泛 Transformer、DINOv3 表征或非检测任务。"
  },
  "review_outline": {
    "sections": [
      "问题定义",
      "原始 DETR",
      "收敛与训练改进",
      "3D/实时扩展",
      "coverage gaps"
    ]
  },
  "taxonomy": {
    "nodes": [
      {
        "id": "baseline",
        "label": "原始 DETR 范式",
        "papers": [
          "1:EIMSDEU3"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "convergence",
        "label": "收敛与多尺度改进",
        "papers": [
          "1:5HBHAWIV",
          "1:HPLZ65Z2"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "extension",
        "label": "3D 与实时扩展",
        "papers": [
          "1:3JUY9GBQ",
          "1:SZ3GNWT9"
        ]
      }
    ],
    "summary": {
      "zh": "DETR-family 可按原始 set prediction、收敛/多尺度改进、query/anchor 训练策略、跨场景扩展和实时化部署来组织。"
    }
  },
  "timeline_events": {
    "events": [
      {
        "event": "DETR 提出端到端 set prediction 检测。",
        "paper_ref": "1:EIMSDEU3",
        "year": 2020
      },
      {
        "event": "Deformable DETR 改善收敛和多尺度处理。",
        "paper_ref": "1:5HBHAWIV",
        "year": 2021
      },
      {
        "event": "DINO 强化 denoising 与 anchor query 训练路线。",
        "paper_ref": "1:HPLZ65Z2",
        "year": 2022
      },
      {
        "event": "DETR3D 扩展到多视角 3D 检测。",
        "paper_ref": "1:3JUY9GBQ",
        "year": 2022
      },
      {
        "event": "RF-DETR 指向实时 detection transformer。",
        "paper_ref": "1:SZ3GNWT9",
        "year": 2025
      }
    ],
    "summary": {
      "zh": "样例 workset 从 2020 原始 DETR 到 2025 RF-DETR，覆盖方法提出、收敛修正、3D 扩展和实时化。"
    }
  }
}

workspace/runtime/acp/skill-runs/acp-skill-detr-create-topic-synthesis/runtime/payloads/coverage-and-collection-suggestions.json
{
  "coverage_caveats": [
    {
      "message": "未纳入全部 22 篇 resolver 候选。",
      "type": "bounded_sample"
    },
    {
      "message": "未覆盖 Conditional DETR、DN-DETR、RT-DETRv2/v3、Group DETR 等候选。",
      "type": "missing_variants"
    }
  ],
  "coverage_reason": "全仿真样例只选择 5 篇代表论文，足以覆盖 DETR 原点、收敛改进、训练策略、3D 扩展和近期实时化，但不能代表完整 DETR-family 文献图谱。",
  "coverage_verdict": "partial",
  "diagnostics": [],
  "external_context_summary": "split runtime 未抓取外部网络文献；external-literature-context.md 仅记录本 run 没有 external fetch。",
  "reliability_summary": "所有 5 篇均来自真实 Host Bridge resolver 返回集合，并通过 runtime resolver cascade、citation metrics 和 filtered artifact export 进入同一 SQLite workset；结论可靠性适合作为 schema/playbook 基准，不适合作为最终学术综述。",
  "suggested_collection_directions": [
    {
      "direction": "补齐训练/收敛变体",
      "example_titles_or_terms": [
        "DN-DETR",
        "Conditional DETR",
        "Group DETR"
      ],
      "priority": "high",
      "reason": "当前样例只有 DINO 和 Deformable DETR，未纳入 DN-DETR、Conditional DETR、Group DETR。"
    },
    {
      "direction": "补齐实时 DETR 路线",
      "example_titles_or_terms": [
        "RT-DETR",
        "LW-DETR",
        "DETRs beat YOLOs"
      ],
      "priority": "medium",
      "reason": "RF-DETR 之外还需要 RT-DETR、LW-DETR、DETRs beat YOLOs 等文献支撑部署效率分析。"
    },
    {
      "direction": "加入综述与 benchmark",
      "example_titles_or_terms": [
        "Object Detection with Transformers: A Review"
      ],
      "priority": "medium",
      "reason": "后续正式 topic synthesis 需要 review paper 与 benchmark 论文校准术语和覆盖度。"
    }
  ]
}

{
  "aliases": [
    "DETR",
    "Detection Transformer",
    "DETR-family detectors"
  ],
  "definition": "以 DETR 为起点的 query-based、set-prediction 目标检测方法族，重点关注端到端检测、训练收敛、query/anchor 设计、多尺度特征和实时化变体。",
  "diagnostics": [],
  "duplicate_candidate_ids": [],

  "duplicate_status": "none",
  "scope_exclude": [
    "仅使用 DINOv2/DINOv3 表征但不讨论 DETR 检测框架的论文",
    "泛 Transformer 或 ViT 分类论文",
    "传统 CNN/YOLO/Faster R-CNN 背景论文，除非作为对照"
  ],
  "scope_include": [
    "DETR 原始方法",
    "DETR-family 目标检测变体",
    "收敛加速与 query/anchor 设计",
    "2D/3D/real-time detection transformer 扩展"
  ],
  "topic_title": "DETR-style Object Detection"
}

workspace/runtime/acp/skill-runs/acp-skill-detr-create-topic-synthesis/runtime/payloads/prepare-analysis-context.json
{
  "assessments": [
    {
      "caveats": [
        "原始训练收敛慢，对小目标和多尺度细节不够友好。"
      ],
      "core_digest": "DETR 把目标检测重构为集合预测问题，用 Transformer decoder object queries 和 Hungarian matching 避免手工 NMS/anchor 后处理，是本 topic 的方法原点。",
      "diagnostics": [],
      "paper_quality_level": "high",
      "paper_quality_reason": "作为 baseline 和概念源头质量高；后续变体几乎都以其训练速度和小目标表现为问题起点。",
      "paper_ref": "1:EIMSDEU3",
      "relevance_level": "core",
      "relevance_reason": "DETR 原始论文，直接定义了 set prediction、object queries 和 bipartite matching 的端到端检测范式。"
    },
    {
      "caveats": [
        "主要回答效率和多尺度问题，不直接覆盖 denoising 或实时部署路线。"
      ],
      "core_digest": "Deformable DETR 用稀疏 deformable attention 让 query 只关注少量关键采样点，显著改善训练效率和小目标检测。",
      "diagnostics": [],
      "paper_quality_level": "high",
      "paper_quality_reason": "围绕 attention sparsity 和 multi-scale feature sampling 给出明确机制，是理解 DETR-family 工程化改进的核心文献。",
      "paper_ref": "1:5HBHAWIV",
      "relevance_level": "core",
      "relevance_reason": "Deformable DETR 是解决 DETR 收敛慢和多尺度特征利用不足的代表性改进。"
    },
    {
      "caveats": [
        "标题中的 DINO 易与自监督视觉表征 DINOv2/DINOv3 混淆，topic 边界需明确限定为 DETR 检测。"
      ],
      "core_digest": "DINO 通过 denoising anchor boxes 改善 query 学习和 matching 稳定性，展示 DETR-family 从概念验证走向强检测器的训练技术路线。",
      "diagnostics": [],
      "paper_quality_level": "high",
      "paper_quality_reason": "将 query denoising、anchor 设计和端到端检测性能结合，适合支撑训练稳定性和 high-performing variants 的分析。",
      "paper_ref": "1:HPLZ65Z2",
      "relevance_level": "core",
      "relevance_reason": "DINO 代表 denoising training 与 improved anchor boxes 路线，是 DETR 收敛和性能提升的重要节点。"
    },
    {
      "caveats": [
        "它属于 3D/自动驾驶扩展，不能替代 2D DETR-family 主线。"
      ],
      "core_digest": "DETR3D 使用 3D-to-2D queries 把多视角图像信息组织到 3D 检测中，说明 DETR 的 query/set prediction 思路可跨越 2D COCO 场景。",
      "diagnostics": [],
      "paper_quality_level": "medium",
      "paper_quality_reason": "论文展示 query-based detection transformer 在自动驾驶 3D 场景中的迁移价值，是 topic 外延的重要证据。",
      "paper_ref": "1:3JUY9GBQ",
      "relevance_level": "core",
      "relevance_reason": "DETR3D 将 DETR 查询范式扩展到多视角 3D object detection，代表 detection paradigm extension。"
    },
    {
      "caveats": [
        "作为 2025 近期文献，需在后续人工综述中继续核实其影响力和独立复现情况。"
      ],
      "core_digest": "RF-DETR 把 DETR-family 推向实时检测和架构搜索/部署约束，显示该主题从收敛改进继续演化到效率、迁移和工程约束。",
      "diagnostics": [],
      "paper_quality_level": "medium",
      "paper_quality_reason": "其标签覆盖 real-time、pretraining、fine-tuning、edge-deployment，适合暴露当前 collection 的近期发展面向。",
      "paper_ref": "1:SZ3GNWT9",
      "relevance_level": "core",
      "relevance_reason": "RF-DETR 是近期 real-time detection transformers 方向的高相关变体，反映 DETR-family 与实时部署需求的结合。"
    }
  ]
}

summary.json

agent 手写后 submit · 1,315 bytes

workspace/runtime/acp/skill-runs/acp-skill-detr-create-topic-synthesis/runtime/payloads/summary.json
{
  "diagnostics": [],
  "key_takeaways": [
    "DETR 的主题边界应限定为 query-based end-to-end object detection，避免混入泛 Transformer 或 DINOv3 表征文献。",
    "收敛效率和 query/anchor 设计是 DETR-family 最核心的改进轴。",
    "3D 与 real-time 方向说明 DETR 已从原始 2D 检测扩展到更复杂的应用约束。",
    "正式综述需要补充未入选的 17 篇 resolver 候选，尤其是 Conditional/DN/RT/LW/Group DETR。"
  ],
  "summary_brief": "DETR-style Object Detection 的样例 synthesis 显示：DETR 以 set prediction 和 object queries 开启端到端检测范式，后续代表性工作围绕收敛、多尺度、query/anchor 训练稳定性、3D 扩展和实时部署继续演化。",
  "summary_overview": "本次全仿真 playbook 使用真实 Zotero Bridge resolver 从 DETR 候选集中选择 5 篇代表论文，并通过 split runtime 生成 SQLite receipts、handoff、context views、sidecars、sections 和 final candidate。样例结论强调方法演进链：原始 DETR 定义问题，Deformable DETR 和 DINO 修复训练与多尺度瓶颈，DETR3D 展示范式迁移，RF-DETR 暴露实时化与部署方向。由于样例只使用 5 篇，最终结果应作为 schema 与 gate 基准，而不是完整主题综述。"
}

workspace/runtime/acp/skill-runs/acp-skill-detr-create-topic-synthesis/runtime/views/cross-paper-context.md

1,229 bytes

workspace/runtime/acp/skill-runs/acp-skill-detr-create-topic-synthesis/runtime/views/cross-paper-context.md
# Cross-paper Context

- `1:3JUY9GBQ` DETR3D: 3D object detection from multi-view images via 3D-to-2D queries: DETR3D 使用 3D-to-2D queries 把多视角图像信息组织到 3D 检测中，说明 DETR 的 query/set prediction 思路可跨越 2D COCO 场景。
- `1:5HBHAWIV` Deformable DETR: deformable transformers for end-to-end object detection: Deformable DETR 用稀疏 deformable attention 让 query 只关注少量关键采样点，显著改善训练效率和小目标检测。
- `1:EIMSDEU3` End-to-end object detection with transformers: DETR 把目标检测重构为集合预测问题，用 Transformer decoder object queries 和 Hungarian matching 避免手工 NMS/anchor 后处理，是本 topic 的方法原点。
- `1:HPLZ65Z2` DINO: DETR with improved DeNoising anchor boxes for end-to-end object detection: DINO 通过 denoising anchor boxes 改善 query 学习和 matching 稳定性，展示 DETR-family 从概念验证走向强检测器的训练技术路线。
- `1:SZ3GNWT9` RF-DETR: neural architecture search for real-time detection transformers: RF-DETR 把 DETR-family 推向实时检测和架构搜索/部署约束，显示该主题从收敛改进继续演化到效率、迁移和工程约束。

workspace/runtime/acp/skill-runs/acp-skill-detr-create-topic-synthesis/runtime/views/synthesis-report.md
# Topic Synthesis Report

全仿真样例只选择 5 篇代表论文，足以覆盖 DETR 原点、收敛改进、训练策略、3D 扩展和近期实时化，但不能代表完整 DETR-family 文献图谱。

split runtime 未抓取外部网络文献；external-literature-context.md 仅记录本 run 没有 external fetch。

Final Result

Finalize 结束后由 runtime 生成最终候选、topic analysis manifest、sections 和 sidecars。最终业务输出必须是 topic_synthesis，不是 handoff。

Final Candidate

workspace/runtime/acp/skill-runs/acp-skill-detr-create-topic-synthesis/result/final-output.candidate.json
{
  "__SKILL_DONE__": true,
  "analysis_manifest_path": "result/topic-analysis.json",
  "artifact_metadata": {
    "runtime": "split-skill"
  },
  "candidate_output_path": "result/final-output.candidate.json",

2,008 bytes

workspace/runtime/acp/skill-runs/acp-skill-detr-create-topic-synthesis/result/sections/coverage.json
{
  "coverage_caveats": [
    {
      "message": "未纳入全部 22 篇 resolver 候选。",
      "type": "bounded_sample"
    },
    {
      "message": "未覆盖 Conditional DETR、DN-DETR、RT-DETRv2/v3、Group DETR 等候选。",
      "type": "missing_variants"
    }
  ],
  "coverage_reason": "全仿真样例只选择 5 篇代表论文，足以覆盖 DETR 原点、收敛改进、训练策略、3D 扩展和近期实时化，但不能代表完整 DETR-family 文献图谱。",
  "coverage_verdict": "partial",
  "diagnostics": [],
  "external_context_summary": "split runtime 未抓取外部网络文献；external-literature-context.md 仅记录本 run 没有 external fetch。",
  "reliability_summary": "所有 5 篇均来自真实 Host Bridge resolver 返回集合，并通过 runtime resolver cascade、citation metrics 和 filtered artifact export 进入同一 SQLite workset；结论可靠性适合作为 schema/playbook 基准，不适合作为最终学术综述。",
  "suggested_collection_directions": [
    {
      "direction": "补齐训练/收敛变体",
      "example_titles_or_terms": [
        "DN-DETR",
        "Conditional DETR",
        "Group DETR"
      ],
      "priority": "high",
      "reason": "当前样例只有 DINO 和 Deformable DETR，未纳入 DN-DETR、Conditional DETR、Group DETR。"
    },
    {
      "direction": "补齐实时 DETR 路线",
      "example_titles_or_terms": [
        "RT-DETR",
        "LW-DETR",
        "DETRs beat YOLOs"
      ],
      "priority": "medium",
      "reason": "RF-DETR 之外还需要 RT-DETR、LW-DETR、DETRs beat YOLOs 等文献支撑部署效率分析。"
    },
    {
      "direction": "加入综述与 benchmark",
      "example_titles_or_terms": [
        "Object Detection with Transformers: A Review"
      ],
      "priority": "medium",
      "reason": "后续正式 topic synthesis 需要 review paper 与 benchmark 论文校准术语和覆盖度。"
    }
  ]
}

workspace/runtime/acp/skill-runs/acp-skill-detr-create-topic-synthesis/result/sections/summary.json

1,315 bytes

workspace/runtime/acp/skill-runs/acp-skill-detr-create-topic-synthesis/result/sections/summary.json
{
  "diagnostics": [],
  "key_takeaways": [
    "DETR 的主题边界应限定为 query-based end-to-end object detection，避免混入泛 Transformer 或 DINOv3 表征文献。",
    "收敛效率和 query/anchor 设计是 DETR-family 最核心的改进轴。",
    "3D 与 real-time 方向说明 DETR 已从原始 2D 检测扩展到更复杂的应用约束。",
    "正式综述需要补充未入选的 17 篇 resolver 候选，尤其是 Conditional/DN/RT/LW/Group DETR。"
  ],
  "summary_brief": "DETR-style Object Detection 的样例 synthesis 显示：DETR 以 set prediction 和 object queries 开启端到端检测范式，后续代表性工作围绕收敛、多尺度、query/anchor 训练稳定性、3D 扩展和实时部署继续演化。",
  "summary_overview": "本次全仿真 playbook 使用真实 Zotero Bridge resolver 从 DETR 候选集中选择 5 篇代表论文，并通过 split runtime 生成 SQLite receipts、handoff、context views、sidecars、sections 和 final candidate。样例结论强调方法演进链：原始 DETR 定义问题，Deformable DETR 和 DINO 修复训练与多尺度瓶颈，DETR3D 展示范式迁移，RF-DETR 暴露实时化与部署方向。由于样例只使用 5 篇，最终结果应作为 schema 与 gate 基准，而不是完整主题综述。"
}
